item.description:
Location: Finland
Description:

Skilled professionals are sought for shipbuilding and construction projects in Finland. Open positions include Pipe Fitters, Welders, Heavy Plate Fabricators, Sheet Metal Workers, and Steel Structure Workers. Applicants require a valid Finnish work permit, Occupational Safety Card, Hot Work Certificate, and 3-5 years of relevant experience in shipbuilding or construction. A strong work ethic and commitment to quality and safety are essential.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Shipbuilding Construction Jobs in Finland at KTS Solution OY

item.description:
Location: Mumbai
Description:

Hiring for HSEQ Superintendent position on Bulk Carriers. Requires 1-3 years of shore experience and sailing experience as Master Mariner or Chief Engineer on Dry Bulk Fleets. Position based in Mumbai.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] HSEQ Superintendent Job on Bulk Carriers at The Shipping Tribune

item.description:
Location: Saudi Aramco operations
Description:

An experienced Crewing Officer is sought for immediate joining within Offshore Marine Logistics (OML), supporting Saudi Aramco operations. The role requires proven experience in OML crewing, knowledge of Saudi Aramco procedures, and strong skills in crew documentation, certifications, visas, and compliance. Candidates with experience on Aramco-approved projects are preferred. This position requires a proactive and results-oriented professional.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Crewing Officer Job - Offshore Marine Logistics at Shipworkz Marine Services LLC

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Vacancies are available for shore-based roles within the maritime industry. Interested candidates are invited to submit their CV for consideration.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Shore Based Maritime Positions at Arcadia Shipmanagement Company Limited

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Crew Operator / Sea HR Administrator position is open within the tanker fleet operations. This role supports the international maritime environment, focusing on teamwork and individual development. The company offers a supportive atmosphere with potential career progression opportunities.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Crew Operator / HR Admin Job - Tanker Fleet at German Tanker Shipping GmbH & Company KG

item.description:
Location: Mumbai
Description:

An experienced Project Director is sought to lead the engineering, procurement, construction, installation, and commissioning (EPCIC) of offshore wind HVDC converter station projects. This role involves global multi-site leadership, client and stakeholder management, and overseeing yard operations, marine logistics, and offshore installation. The position requires a Bachelor's/Master's degree in Engineering and 20-25+ years of EPCIC experience in heavy offshore sectors, with mandatory experience in North Sea deployment or for European transmission operators.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Project Director Job - Offshore Wind EPCIC at L&T Energy Offshore Wind

item.description:
Location: Hessen, Germany
Description:

A Crane Operator is sought for a logistics and cargo handling role in Hessen, Germany. Responsibilities include loading and unloading ships, trucks, and rail wagons, and operating crane systems. A minimum of 3 years of experience, B2 German language proficiency, and a valid driving license are required. The gross monthly salary is €2,800.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Crane Operator Job in Hessen, Germany at globaltalentsquare.com

item.description:
Location: Netherlands
Description:

📍 Location: Netherlands – different projects usualy in Rotterdam area
📅 Start Date: ASAP
📄 Contract: Dutch temporary agency contract
⏳ Hours: 40 hrs/week guaranteed + possible overtime

💡 Your Tasks:

✅ Cable duct assembly (Unistrut)
✅ Dismantling steel structures when no longer needed or for relocation/replacement
✅ Securing steel components with bolts, rivets, or welding
✅ Installing metal floor & roof decking, securing flooring panels
✅ Protective tube assembly
✅ Assembling small iron constructions (stairs, fences)

🔥 What We Offer:

🏠 Free housing (single room in shared apartment)
🚗 Company car provided (or km allowance if using own car)
✈️ First & last flight paid (rotation travel at worker’s expense)
💰 Weekly salary payments
🩺 Health insurance arranged by Wanted and deducted from your growth salary
🔄 Preferred rotation: 6 weeks work / 2 weeks home (flexible)

🦺 Bring your own safety shoes (S3 over ankle), other PPE provided by Wanted, if needed

🔎 Requirements:

✔️ Conversational English required
✔️ VCA & BSN (We can help you obtain them if needed)
✔️ Driving license (Advantage)

📩 Interested? Apply now!

Countries: Netherlands

Languages: English



Apply to this job
item.title: [Hot Job] Ironworkers at WANTED Spijkenisse

item.description:
Location: Netherlands
Description:

📍 Location: Netherlands, Belgium – several projects
📅 Start Date: ASAP
📄 Contract: Dutch/Belgian temporary agency contract
⏳ Hours: 40 hrs/week guaranteed + possible overtime

💡 Your Tasks:

✅ Read & interpret technical drawings
✅ Unload & position steel components
✅ Align & secure steel beams and columns
✅ Use hand tools & machinery
✅ Follow safety protocols & use protective gear
✅ Collaborate with construction workers & managers

🔥 What We Offer:

🏠 Free housing (single room in shared apartment)
🚗 Company car provided (or km allowance if using own car)
✈️ First & last flight paid (rotation travel at worker’s expense)
💰 Weekly salary payments
🩺 Health insurance arranged by Wanted and deducted from your growth salary
🔄 Preferred rotation: 6 weeks work / 2 weeks home (flexible)

🦺 Bring your own safety shoes (S3 over ankle), other PPE provided by Wanted, if needed

🔎 Requirements:

✔️ 3+ years of experience in a similar role
✔️ Good understanding of English
✔️ VCA & BSN (We can help you obtain them if needed)
✔️ Driving license (Advantage)

📩 Interested? Apply now!

Countries: Belgium Netherlands

Languages: English



Apply to this job
item.title: [Hot Job] Steel Erectors at WANTED Spijkenisse
